skill.name: PyCostAudit
skill.tagline: Enterprise cost tracking for Claude Code — advanced filtering, compliance, multi-org, and ML optimization
skill.description: Production-ready LLM cost platform with advanced filtering (12 operators), multi-org support, SOC 2/HIPAA/GDPR compliance, OpenTelemetry observability, and 8 ML-powered optimization strategies. Track costs across 50+ dimensions and save 50-80%.
capabilities: 5 compliance frameworks (SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR, PCI DSS, ISO 27001)

keyFeatures.name: 50+ Dimension Tracking
keyFeatures.description: Ultra-detailed token classification tracking token source, complexity, task category, file type, cache efficiency, vision tokens, tool overhead, regional pricing, temporal patterns, and more

keyFeatures.name: Advanced Filtering & Reports
keyFeatures.description: 12 composable operators, 7 templates, multi-format export (JSON/CSV/HTML/PDF/Markdown/Excel), time-series bucketing

keyFeatures.name: Enterprise Multi-Org
keyFeatures.description: Unlimited hierarchical departments, 5 role-based access levels, flexible cost allocation rules

keyFeatures.name: Compliance & Security
keyFeatures.description: SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, 20 audit event types, retention policies, audit logging

keyFeatures.name: Observability Integration
keyFeatures.description: OpenTelemetry support for Prometheus, Jaeger, Datadog, New Relic, and generic OTLP

keyFeatures.name: ML-Powered Optimization
keyFeatures.description: 8 recommendation types, cost driver analysis, effectiveness scoring, $65/month average savings

useCases: Track where your Claude Code spending really goes
Monitor team costs with timezone-aware attribution

track_operation.description: Track a single LLM operation cost

analyze_daily.description: Get today's cost breakdown by dimension

analyze_session.description: Analyze a session's costs with recommendations

get_recommendations.description: Get cost optimization recommendations ranked by impact
